allowed_public_claim: In these five bounded local entropy scenarios, pond-backed survivable-lineage replay preserved operational reconstruction under degradation more often than visible-only replay.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would treat metadata participation as independent proof of broad capability.
claims.safe_public_wording: Pond-backed runtime participated through bounded consult responses and runtime hashes.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would imply coverage beyond the selected local domains.
claims.safe_public_wording: Five bounded entropy scenarios were tested.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would imply statistical independence not established by this proof.
claims.safe_public_wording: Scenario domains were separated for this gauntlet.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would ignore possible implementation mistakes outside these artifacts.
claims.safe_public_wording: Visible-only and pond-backed replay modes used separated input allowances.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would imply external adjudication already occurred.
claims.safe_public_wording: A blinded key-scoring pack was created.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would convert a local replay result into a broad superiority claim.
claims.safe_public_wording: The aggregate verdict is bounded to these five scenarios.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would exceed the evidence boundary.
claims.safe_public_wording: No global superiority claim is made.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would attach unsupported capability meaning to replay reconstruction scores.
claims.safe_public_wording: No AGI, consciousness, or black-box-solved claim is made.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would turn a constructed replay comparison into an unsupported defect diagnosis.
claims.safe_public_wording: No target-system defect claim is made.

claims.risk_if_overstated: Overstating this would hide residual uncertainty in scenario construction and scoring.
claims.safe_public_wording: Unresolved questions are preserved rather than erased.

unresolved_questions: Whether the same pattern holds under independently authored external fixtures.
Whether larger hidden packs produce the same reconstruction deltas.
Whether alternative visible-only summaries narrow the observed gap.
